pagos_gasto_tenant_select.name: pagos_gasto_tenant_select
pagos_gasto_tenant_select.using: "pagos_gasto"."gasto_id" in (select id from gastos where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()))

pagos_gasto_tenant_modify.withCheck: "pagos_gasto"."gasto_id" in (select id from gastos where tenant_id = (select current_tenant_id()))

compras_item_segun_tipo.name: compras_item_segun_tipo
compras_item_segun_tipo.value:
("compras"."tipo" = 'insumo' and "compras"."insumo_id" is not null and "compras"."producto_id" is null)
          or ("compras"."tipo" = 'reventa' and "compras"."producto_id" is not null and "compras"."insumo_id" is null)
